creator: cem@freebsd.org
text: I can't test 11.x, sorry.  Perhaps bash is affected by the brk bug fixed in CURRENT at r335702?  Or r335516?  It's odd to me that you're seeing a behavior difference between Ryzen and Intel with the exact same software.  Linuxulator does not do anything (AFAIK) that touches on any Zen errata I'm aware of.
